title: Naval Research Laboratory Receives Space Force Antenna, Expanding Joint Space Capabilities
description: The U.S. Naval Research Laboratory received a transportable satellite tracking antenna system from Space Systems Command's System Delta 81 to expand joint space testing, training and operational support capabilities at the laboratory's Blossom Point Tracking Facility in Welcome, Md.

body.text: Earlier this year, the U.S. Naval Research Laboratory received a transportable satellite tracking antenna system from Space Systems Command's System Delta 81 to expand joint space testing, training and operational support capabilities at the laboratory's Blossom Point Tracking Facility in Welcome, Maryland.
Engineers from the U.S. Naval Research Laboratory and L3 Harris unload an antenna pedestal at Blossom Point Tracking Facility in Welcome, Md., Feb. 25, 2026.
